title: mesosphaerum angustifolium
intro: Mesosphaerum angustifolium, also known as Lemon Balm or Narrow-leaved Bee Balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum angustifolium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Mesosphaerum angustifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
